text_raw: Damn it...
text_clean: Damn it...

text_raw: Greymane.
text_clean: Greymane.

text_raw: Listen, it's dangerous to go any further up.
text_clean: Listen, it's dangerous to go any further up.

text_raw: Leave this to us and hurry on down.
text_clean: Leave this to us and hurry on down.

text_raw: They say those who climb too far end up cursed.
text_clean: They say those who climb too far end up cursed.

text_raw: No, you mustn't! Strange wraiths have taken hold of the mountain.
text_clean: No, you mustn't! Strange wraiths have taken hold of the mountain.

text_raw: Their numbers grow with each passing day.
text_clean: Their numbers grow with each passing day.

text_raw: They're angry... and violent!
text_clean: They're angry... and violent!

text_raw: Your wound looks serious.
text_clean: Your wound looks serious.

text_raw: Blasted mountain... brings back all the old tales.
text_clean: Blasted mountain... brings back all the old tales.

text_raw: They say wraiths call the cold.
text_clean: They say wraiths call the cold.

text_raw: What if those bandits show up all of a sudden...
text_clean: What if those bandits show up all of a sudden...

text_raw: Nah, it just doesn't sit right with me.
text_clean: Nah, it just doesn't sit right with me.

text_raw: Through all that bloody snow?
text_clean: Through all that bloody snow?

text_raw: You bloody what? You actually defeated it?
text_clean: You bloody what? You actually defeated it?

text_raw: To stand against a horror like that takes true courage.
text_clean: To stand against a horror like that takes true courage.

text_raw: At long last... the curse will finally be lifted!
text_clean: At long last... the curse will finally be lifted!

text_raw: Aye, the tale says a frozen king roams the peaks, seeking the kingdom he lost.
text_clean: Aye, the tale says a frozen king roams the peaks, seeking the kingdom he lost.

text_raw: But that's just an old legend...
text_clean: But that's just an old legend...

text_raw: You came back in one piece?

text_raw: Hey, captain, you hear that?
text_clean: Hey, captain, you hear that?

text_raw: The wraith! He did it!
text_clean: The wraith! He did it!

text_raw: I'm back from the mountain.
text_clean: I'm back from the mountain.

text_raw: I've dealt with the black wraith.

text_raw: It said something about a kingdom.
